trivia: The stretched MAX trades a little range for more seats, doing dense domestic work for a handful of big operators. Far rarer than the MAX 8, it rewards a careful look at fuselage length.
Same split winglets as every MAX; the extra plug ahead of the wing is what you are squinting for.
funFacts: Alaska and United fly most of the world's fleet.
About 2.7 m longer than the MAX 8.
